articles.title: RXT stock has given up its prior gain. Rackspace Technology shares were trading higher after the company announced a strategic partnership with Uniphore, an AI company backed by NVIDIA and AMD, to deliver the industry's first Infrastructure-to-Agents architecture, which will be offered as an outcomes-based service.

Rackspace Stock Up On AI Partnership With Uniphore — Rackspace Technology shares are trading higher Tuesday after the company announced an Infrastructure-to-Agents partnersh

Rackspace Technology shares are trading higher after the company announced a strategic partnership with Uniphore, an AI company backed by NVIDIA and AMD, to deliver the industry's first Infrastructure-to-Agents architecture, which will be offered as an outcomes-based service.
